_comment: Inline policy for ab-gateway-controller-role (Traffic Controller Lambda runtime).
Attach via: iam:PutRolePolicy on role ab-gateway-controller-role.
Replace ACCOUNT_ID and REGION with your actual values before use.
cloudwatch:GetMetricStatistics  — metrics_reader.py: reads ABGateway + AWS/SageMaker namespaces
dynamodb:GetItem                — handler.py: reads current routing config (idempotency + weights)
dynamodb:UpdateItem             — handler.py: writes updated weights + latency_cache + version
logs:CreateLogStream            — Lambda execution: creates stream per invocation
logs:PutLogEvents               — Lambda execution: structured decision log + error logs

Statement._comment: CloudWatch does not support resource-level conditions on GetMetricStatistics. Namespace-level restriction is not possible via IAM resource ARNs.
Scoped to the single routing config table. No PutItem — controller uses UpdateItem only to preserve strategy and shadow_target fields.
Scoped to the controller log group only. The :* suffix covers log streams within the group.
